projectDescription: A plug-and-play GitHub Actions security scanner that automatically runs five industry-standard tools (Gitleaks, Bandit, Checkov, Nuclei, Dockle) on every push, pull request, or scheduled scan, aggregating results into a security summary and GitHub Issue.
keyFeatures: Five integrated security scanners: Gitleaks, Bandit, Checkov, Nuclei, Dockle
Zero-setup reusable GitHub Actions workflow via workflow_call
Automatic GitHub Issue creation with aggregated security findings
Supports push, pull request, scheduled (cron), and manual triggers
Generates clean Markdown reports with severity counts and actionable findings
Scans secrets, Python code, IaC misconfigurations, DAST vulnerabilities, and Docker images
publicApiSurface: scan-dockle.yml (Docker image security and best practices)
GitHub Issue with full security findings (auto-created)
